title: Ray's 3D Stormbreaker
description: Wield the power of Thor! ⚡ Replaces the vanilla Mace with a detailed 3D Stormbreaker model + custom Thunder sounds.
body:
# ⚡ Ray's 3D Stormbreaker
**Bring the Thunder to Minecraft 26.1+!**

Transform the new Mace weapon into the legendary Stormbreaker. This resource pack completely remodels the weapon into a detailed, vanilla-style 3D model while keeping the classic Minecraft aesthetic.

---

## ✨ Features
* **🔨 Custom 3D Model:** Replaces the flat 2D mace with a hefty, two-sided 3D axe/hammer hybrid. Built using vanilla textures (Iron, Oak, Diorite) — fits perfectly without looking out of place.
* **🔊 Thunder Sound Effects:**
  * 💥 **Heavy Smash:** Falling from height and hitting an enemy triggers a massive Thunderclap sound.
  * 👊 **Standard Hit:** Regular hits have a weighty, impactful thud mixed with rumble.
* **✅ No Mods Required:** Pure Resource Pack — no Optifine or CIT needed. Works on vanilla clients and servers.

---

## 🎮 How to Use
* 📥 Download the Resource Pack
* 📂 Place the `.zip` file in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
* ⚙️ Enable it in **Options > Resource Packs**

---

## 📦 Compatibility
| Version | Status |
|---|---|
| Minecraft 26.1 (Tiny Takeover) | ✅ Supported |
| Minecraft 26.2 (Chaos Cubed) | ✅ Supported |

---
